form.searchTemplate: sourcetype=snmptrap login_name=*$username$* agent_address=*$srchost$* reason=$actreason$ action=$actiontaken$ result=$actresult$ host=*$dsthost$* | table _time, host, agent_address, login_name, action, result, reason | convert ctime(_time) | rename _time AS "Date/Time", host AS "Host", agent_address AS "Src Host", action AS "Action Taken", reason AS "Reason", login_name AS "Username", result AS "Result"
form.label: Event Search

center.h3: Manually search events that have taken place on your appliances. The Host, Src Host and Username fields are wildcard searches so you can enter any part of the host or username in the text box. Results can be found in the table below.

input.label: Action:
input.populatingSearch: sourcetype=snmptrap action!=NULL earliest=-12h@h latest=now | fields action | dedup action | stats count by action

input.label: Reason:
input.populatingSearch: sourcetype=snmptrap reason!=NULL earliest=-12h@h latest=now | fields reason | dedup reason | stats count by reason
